Withings MCP Unofficial

Unofficial local-first MCP server for connecting AI agents to user-authorized Withings Public API data.

Default scopes: user.activity user.metrics.
Important tools: withings_connection_status, withings_daily_summary, withings_weekly_summary, withings_list_body_measures, withings_list_sleep_summary, withings_list_heart.
Privacy: tokens stay local under ~/.withings-mcp. summary and structured modes minimize sensitive output. raw mode is explicit.
Boundary: not affiliated with Withings. Not medical advice. Does not expose raw device telemetry.
